Notes: Taryn Mellody scores season-high 23 points and Tiffaney Williams adds
career-high 10 points to lead 10th-ranked Scranton past RPI, 87-50, in
semifinal of Diversified Invitational Friday evening; Lady Royals to
meet Frostburg State in championship game Saturday afternoon
Game.Officials: Kathy Goeringer,  Terry Brazill,  Don Cooper
